query: 小红书种草封面，珍珠奶茶，粉色少女风，，夏日清凉感

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for bubble tea in pink girly summer aesthetic for Xiaohongshu social media.

Style/medium: lifestyle product photography, soft feminine aesthetic inspired by Korean beauty brand campaigns, clean and aspirational
Composition: top-down flat lay at 45-degree angle, centered bubble tea cup as hero, negative space for text overlay, 3:4 portrait ratio optimized for mobile feed
Subject: iced bubble tea with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on cup, pastel pink straw, decorative elements like flower petals or fruit slices
Scene/backdrop: marble or light wood surface, soft pink fabric or paper props, minimal summer accessories (sunglasses, flowers)
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight from window, soft diffused shadows, fresh and breezy summer atmosphere
Color palette: soft pastel pink as dominant, creamy white milk tea tones, warm brown pearls as accent, high-key bright overall
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup with condensation, chewy tapioca texture visible, soft fabric draping
Constraints: must work as Xiaohongshu cover image with space for headline text overlay; vertical 3:4 crop friendly
Avoid: dark moody lighting, cluttered composition, realistic 8K stuffer labels, generic stock photo aesthetic, oversaturated neon colors

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为珍珠奶茶生成一张小红书种草封面图，夏日清凉感。

风格/介质:小红书风格产品摄影，粉色少女风，清新甜美，ins 风生活美学
构图:俯拍 45 度角，主体偏中心，周围留白充足，适合加文字贴纸
主体:一杯珍珠奶茶，透明杯身可见琥珀色奶茶与黑糖珍珠分层，杯壁有水珠凝结
场景/背景:浅粉色或白色桌面，散落几片粉色花瓣或冰块道具，背景虚化
光线/氛围:明亮自然光，柔光箱漫射，通透清新，夏日清凉感
色彩搭配:粉色为主色调，奶茶琥珀色与珍珠深棕色形成对比，整体柔和不刺眼
材质/纹理:杯壁水珠的晶莹感，珍珠的 Q 弹光泽，奶茶的丝滑质感
避免:过度饱和、廉价塑料感、杂乱背景、暗调光线、秋冬暖色调
